title: Synoptikon QC Payload
text: v1 payload JSON object required top-level fields: schema_version: exactly flounder.synoptikon_qc_payload.v1. payload_id: caller-supplied stable identifier QC handoff. generated_at_utc: ISO-8601 UTC production timestamp. producer: floundeR runtime version metadata. run_identity: run, sample, project, flow-cell, kit, instrument identifiers known. governance_context: optional Synoptikon/Mneion identifiers tenant, governance domain, project, work request, work attempt, report ids. input_provenance: array local, object-store, derived input records. qc_sections: sectioned QC evidence. report_cards: one pass/warn/fail report-card rows. limitations: explicit caveats, missing evidence, bounded scan notes, parser/runtime limitations. handoff: intended consumer compatibility metadata.

title: Synoptikon QC Payload
text: qc_sections contains named section objects. Every section : present: whether evidence section present. schema_version: native floundeR schema version evidence, null section present. status: one pass, warn, fail, not_available, not_checked. summary: compact scalar values suitable list pages triage. tables: named arrays row objects using existing floundeR table shapes. artifacts: optional references external table, plot, manifest, report artifacts checksums. v1 named sections : sequencing_summary: run-level read, base, quality, duration, pass/fail evidence qc_run_summary() tidy QC helpers. flowcell: channel-density spatial-yield evidence. barcode: barcode composition balance evidence. pod5: POD5 discovery, verification, folder-info, manifest, comparison, demonstration-subset provenance evidence. bam: Bamana-derived summary, verification, validation, EOF, index, mapping, sorting, tag, BAM report-card evidence. library_preparation: reserved Porkchop-derived kit, adapter, primer, barcode, cDNA, score-terminology, provenance evidence. title: Toolkit For Nanopore Sequence Analysis
text: floundeR R-native toolbox Oxford Nanopore sequence-data QC review. reads run products analysts already use R, returns stable tidy QC contracts, uses -process Rust heavy lifting belongs: POD5 raw-data inspection pod5-tools, BAM/BGZF/FASTQ evidence bamana, library-preparation evidence porkchop. reboot goal mirror every command Rust projects. goal make floundeR best R interface nanopore run health, raw-data integrity, alignment-level QC, library-preparation evidence, provenance, technical reporting, Synoptikon handoff. FAST5 support retired. Current raw-signal QC POD5-oriented.

title: Toolkit For Nanopore Sequence Analysis
text: Summarises MinKNOW, Guppy, Dorado sequencing-summary files schema-versioned tidy QC tables. Builds run-level report cards yield, read counts, pass fraction, Q-score, read length, channel density, barcode balance. Discovers, verifies, manifests, compares, plans demonstration subdivision POD5 folders without shelling CLI. Uses curated Bamana-backed BAM checks summaries, verification, validation, EOF/index/map/sort/tag evidence, BAM report cards. Uses curated Porkchop-backed evidence ONT kit candidates, adapter primer motifs, barcode evidence, cDNA primer evidence, library-preparation report cards. Exports versioned Synoptikon QC payloads. Builds Grammateus-shaped report contracts, governed figures, plot specs, manifests keeping private Grammateus runtime optional.

title: Toolkit For Nanopore Sequence Analysis
text: Install source-build requirements first: R declared CRAN/Bioconductor package dependencies. Cargo rustc matching SystemRequirements floor DESCRIPTION. Platform build tools compiling R package native code. install GitHub: Detailed source-install notes macOS, Linux, Windows, Docker, CI DEVELOPMENT.md. Public GitHub installation paths optional private Grammateus runtime setup documented GITHUB_INSTALLATION.md. Core QC require private Grammateus source runtime assets. Governed HTML/PDF rendering can use optional prebuilt Grammateus runtime authorized configured GRAMMATEUS_HOME, package options, runtime cache helpers.

code: library(floundeR)  summary_file <- flnDr("sequencing_summary.txt.bz2")  run_summary <- qc_run_summary(summary_file) barcode_balance <- qc_barcode_composition(summary_file) run_card <- qc_report_card(   run_summary,   barcode_composition = barcode_balance )  run_summary[, c(   "read_count",   "total_bases",   "pass_fraction",   "mean_qscore",   "n50_read_length",   "channel_count" )]  table(run_card$status)  payload <- as_synoptikon_qc(   run_summary = run_summary,   barcode = barcode_balance,   report_cards = list(run = run_card) ) payload$schema_version

title: Toolkit For Nanopore Sequence Analysis
text: Production QC reports moving away RMarkdown-first workflows toward Grammateus semantic report contracts. Public floundeR builds can prepare report contracts, figures, plot specs, manifests, provenance without private Grammateus runtime. R can hand existing plot artifact governed report: private runtime absent, qc_report() still writes report contract manifest. Runtime-backed HTML/PDF rendering enabled authorized prebuilt Grammateus runtime installed validated: detailed interface documented REPORTING_INTERFACE.md, private-runtime distribution boundary documented DISTRIBUTION.md.
code: plot_spec <- qc_plot_yield_over_time(yield_over_time) plot_run <- grammateus_render_plot(   plot_spec,   execution = "local_rscript",   run_root = tempdir() ) figures <- lapply(plot_run$artifacts, `[[`, "figure")  theme <- grammateus_mnemosyne_theme() elements <- grammateus_apply_theme(   grammateus_qc_report_elements(     qc_summary = run_summary,     yield_over_time = yield_over_time,     quality_distribution = quality_distribution,     barcode_balance = barcode_balance,     report_card_findings = run_card   ),   theme )  report <- qc_report(   elements = elements,   figures = figures,   output_dir = tempdir(),   output = c("html", "pdf") ) grammateus_runtime_available() grammateus_runtime_validate()

title: Build Grammateus figure metadata from image artifacts — grammateus_figure_from_file
text: path Path existing PNG SVG file. figure_id Stable lower-snake-case figure identifier. Must start figure_. caption Figure caption. alt_text Required accessibility text HTML output. methods_note Optional methods acquisition note. layout_hint Grammateus figure layout hint. source_hash Optional SHA-256 hash source data produced figure. Plain 64-character hex digests accepted normalised sha256:<hex>. produced_by Producing software service name. producer_version Producing software version. produced_at_utc Production timestamp. run_id Optional upstream run, workflow, analysis identifier. width_px, height_px Pixel dimensions existing file. Required SVG dimensions inferred. transparent_background Whether transparent background preservation expected. plot ggplot2 plot object. output_dir Directory plot artifacts written. formats One artifact formats: png, svg. width, height Plot dimensions. units Unit width height; one , cm, mm, px. dpi Output resolution used PNG output pixel metadata. source_data Optional source data used compute source_hash wrapping ggplot2 object. omitted, built plot data used. background Background passed ggplot2::ggsave(). overwrite Whether existing deterministic artifact paths may replaced.

title: Build and render Grammateus semantic plot specifications — grammateus_plot_spec
text: plot_id Stable lower-snake-case plot identifier. Must start plot_. plot_type Semantic plot family: line, bar, stacked_bar, scatter, pca. data Tidy data frame inline plot data, Grammateus data reference list kind = "reference", path, source_hash, row_count. mappings List required x y fields plus optional color, fill, group, label fields. axes List x y axis definitions. axis requires label may include unit, scale, variance_explained. caption Scientific plot caption. theme Named Grammateus theme profile. palette Named Grammateus palette policy. output Output definition width_mm, height_mm, dpi, formats. bar_value_semantics Required bar stacked_bar plots. One counts, percentages, rates, normalized_measurements. source_hash Optional SHA-256 hash source data. Plain 64-character hex digests accepted normalised sha256:<hex>. produced_by Producing software service name. producer_version Producing software version. NULL, installed floundeR version used. produced_at_utc Production timestamp. run_id Optional upstream run, workflow, analysis identifier. plot_spec flounder_grammateus_plot_spec object. execution Plot backend execution mode. local_rscript runs Rscript executable directly. docker_container runs Rscript inside Docker-compatible image run directory mounted /work. run_root Directory deterministic per-plot run directories created. rscript_path Path local Rscript executable. docker_path Path Docker-compatible CLI executable. container_image Container image used execution docker_container. container_rscript Rscript command inside container. required_packages R packages required generated script. overwrite_run_dir Whether existing deterministic run directory may replaced.
